he was (negated by ما before it)
in order to make (someone) lose their way (purpose of كَانَ)
when (referring to past time, connecting to هَدَىٰهُمْ)
until (connects to يُبَيِّنَ - he makes clear)
for them, to them (referring to قَوْمًۢا/people in this ayah)
they protect themselves (from what Allah has forbidden)
with every (connected to عَلِيمٌ and شَىْءٍ)
Allah (as the object being verified by إِنَّ)
any helper/supporter (in a phrase like 'of any helper')
He definitely turned back (subject of اللَّهُ - referring to Allah accepting repentance)
that which (connects to كَادَ - was about to)
of a group (that belongs to them in قُلُوبُ فَرِيقٍ مِّنْهُمْ - hearts of a group among them)
he returned back (from wrong to right)
intensely merciful and kind (describing Allah in this ayah)
the ones who (subject of خُلِّفُوا - were left behind)
they were left behind (referring to الثَّلٰثَةِ - the three)
when (introduces the condition ضَاقَتْ - it became tight)
it (feminine) became tight/narrow (describing الْأَرْضُ - the earth)
the earth (subject of ضَاقَتْ - became tight)
and it (the earth) became tight/constricted (referring to الْأَرْضُ)
upon them (connected to ضَاقَتْ - became tight/constrained)
that (introduces what they thought: لَّا مَلْجَأَ)
any place of refuge (object of لَّا in لَّا مَلْجَأَ)
then (connecting تَابَ with what came before)
he turned back in repentance (before عَلَيْهِمْ)
upon them (connected to أَنفُسُهُمْ - their souls)
so that they may return back (from wrong)
Allah (as the object being referred to)
The Most Accepting of Repentance (a name/attribute of Allah)
they believed (referring to الَّذِينَ - those who)
he was/existed (negated by مَا before it)
that (connects to يَتَخَلَّفُوا۟ - they stay behind)
they deliberately stay behind (subject of كَانَ)
because they (connected to لَا يُصِيبُهُمْ - does not afflict them)
in/within/at (location in سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ - the path of Allah)
the ones who constantly reject truth (as object of يَغِيظُ - angers)
any getting/obtaining (object of يَنَالُونَ - they obtain)
it was written (something that was recorded for them)
for them (referring to the people of Madinah and the Bedouins mentioned earlier)
not (negates يُضِيعُ - He does not waste)
reward (object of يُضِيعُ - does not waste)
the ones who do good (object of يُضِيعُ)
they spend (referring to the believers in this ayah)
a small (feminine, describing the expenditure being spent)
big/large (describing something feminine being acted upon)
they cut/cross through (referring to the believers crossing valleys)
it was written (passive form of كَتَبَ)
for/to them (referring to those who spend and cross valleys mentioned in the previous part of the ayah)
so that he rewards them (referring to those who spend and cross valleys mentioned earlier)
in order that they go out
all together (describing how they went forth)
he went forth/rushed out (subject of لَوْلَا)
so that they seek deep understanding
the ones who (subject of يَلُونَكُم - they border you)
they believed (subject of يَلُونَكُم - those who are near you)
they are near to you all (referring to the believers being addressed in this ayah)
of the ones who constantly reject (truth) (follows مِنَ)
harshness (as the object of وَلْيَجِدُوا - let them find)
Allah (as the object of اعْلَمُوا - know)
what/that which (connects to أُنزِلَتْ - was sent down)
it was sent down (referring to سُورَةٌ/chapter)
then/so from them (connects to يَقُولُ - says)
which of you (subject of يَقُولُ - says)
they believed (referring to the believers mentioned earlier in the ayah)
Those who (refers to people being discussed)
their hearts (referring to those who have disease in their hearts)
their dirt/uncleanliness (connected to قُلُوبِهِم/their hearts in this ayah)
that they (are being tested in يُفْتَنُونَ)
a year (in كُلِّ عَامٍ - every year)
one time (followed by مَرَّتَيْنِ meaning 'two times')
it (referring to سُورَةٌ) was sent down
some of them (looking at إِلَىٰ بَعْضٍ - to one another)
because they (are قَوْمٌ لَّا يَفْقَهُونَ - a people who do not understand)
they understand deeply (referring to the hypocrites who don't understand)
indeed certainly (introducing جَآءَكُمْ/has come to you)
he definitely came to you all
yourselves (referring to those being addressed in رَسُولٌ مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ - a messenger from yourselves)
upon him (referring to رَسُولٌ - the messenger)
you all experienced distress (describing what distresses رَسُولٌ)
one who is eager/concerned (as main quality describing رَسُولٌ)
upon you all (referring to the believers/المؤمنين)
with/towards the believers (in relation to رَءُوفٌ - compassionate)
so/then say! (responding to إِن تَوَلَّوْا۟ - if they turn away)
any god (object of لَآ meaning 'there is no')
he (referring to Allah in this ayah)
upon him (connected to تَوَكَّلْتُ - I relied)
I put my complete trust (in عَلَيْهِ - in Him)
the great, the mighty (describes العَرْشِ - the throne, showing possession)
